resume.subtitle: Product Manager / Project Manager / Engineer
resume.description: 7 years of product management and software engineering. Specialized in 0-to-1 product design, cross-border project management, and digital transformation. PMP, PMI-ACP, and PMI-PBA certified.

aboutHeading.seg3: Specialized in 0-to-1 product design, cross-border project management, and full-stack development.

resume.aboutBody: Over the past seven years, I have led cross-border teams across two countries and five departments. From building an AI-powered financial prediction system for the CEO's dashboard, to convincing reluctant teams across four countries to adopt a new project management platform, my work sits at the intersection of business strategy and hands-on engineering.
resume.featuresH1: Enterprise systems that move the needle.
resume.featuresH2: Built with code. Delivered with clarity.

cards.title: Government EIP Platform.
items: 0-to-1 system architecture for SMESA
AI-accelerated requirements documentation
Encrypted auth under strict gov security policy
Client immediately commissioned follow-up projects

20% reduction in system maintenance risk

Reduced factory financial modeling time by 80%

items: Integrated multi-country project data with Skype messaging
Convinced 50% of core teams to adopt through targeted rollout
Became the company's core PM system within one year
23 teams, 100+ projects, 15% efficiency improvement

items: Hackathon 3rd place, endorsed by CEO, rolled out company-wide
800 meeting rooms across 4 buildings, booking in under 1 minute
97% time savings vs. manual inspection process
Power BI analytics raised space utilization to 85%

startup.subtitle: Founder / Builder
startup.description: Explore a better everyday. Start here. Five AI-powered services plus custom enterprise consulting. From daily life to business operations, making everything simpler.

aboutHeading.seg3: That is why I started building.

startup.aboutBody: It started when former clients called me seven times, asking if I would start my own company to serve them. During that time, I had already been building products on the side, tools born from real frustrations in daily life. A job search coach, a home inventory tracker, a pet food safety scanner. Each one began as a problem I personally wanted solved. When people who used my products started coming back with new needs, I knew this was the path.
startup.featuresH2: AI services for life. Custom solutions for work.
